title: Tig Fromm's base

[[Tig Fromm]] established this '''secret base''' in the [[Vaj Desert]] on [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]]. The operation of the base was largely handled by [[Droid/Legends|droids]] who kept it functioning and provided security.

The secret base was an underground complex of tunnels big enough for speeders to circulate connecting several installations for warehousing, administration, investigation and development duties to accommodate all the criminal activities and plans of the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]]. Activities that where being carried out to using underground [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bays]] dedicated to the handling and maintenance operations in the secrecy of [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm]]´s private criminal starship fleet thanks to the location of this subterranean hideout in the inhospitable Vaj Desert.
[[File:TigFromm4.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Tig Fromm in an office of his base on Ingo.]]
The rest of the base was dedicated to maintain and service the private Tig Fromm´s security army of droids which included [[Fromm Tower Droid]]s. For this purpose [[Fiddler 10|boiler droids]] were used extensively.

Around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], an important major security breach in the base happened due to the actions of [[Kea Moll]], [[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]] along with their droids, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] which were able to break into the secret base and rescue Thall's fellow friend [[Jord Dusat]].
